user_dict.description: Optional user dictionary filename under secbot/resource/fuzzDicts/ (enables brute-force). Glob that directory first with the glob tool and pick ONE filename matching the service — do NOT guess.

pass_dict.description: Optional password dictionary filename under secbot/resource/fuzzDicts/ (enables brute-force). Glob that directory first with the glob tool and pick ONE filename matching the service — do NOT guess.
